final:
module or_gate(
    input wire a,
    input wire b,
    input wire c,
    output wire y
);
    assign y = ~(~a | b & ~c); // OR operation
endmodule

module KoggeStoneAdder (
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output [3:0] SUM,
    output COUT
);
    wire [3:0] P, G, C;
    wire [4:0] C_temp;

    assign P = A ^ B; // Generate Propagate
    assign G = A & B; // Generate Generate

    assign C_temp[0] = 0; // Initial carry
    assign C_temp[1] = G[0]; // Carry for bit 1
    assign C_temp[2] = ~(~G[1] & ~(P[1] & C_temp[1])); // Carry for bit 2
    assign C_temp[3] = G[2] | (P[2] & C_temp[2]); // Carry for bit 3
    assign C_temp[4] = G[3] | (P[3] & C_temp[3]); // Carry for bit 4 (COUT)

    assign SUM = P ^ C_temp[3:0]; // Compute the sum
    assign COUT = C_temp[4]; // Final carry out

endmodule

module CLA_4bit (
    input [3:0] A, // 4-bit input A
    input [3:0] B, // 4-bit input B
    input Cin,     // Carry input
    output [3:0] S, // 4-bit sum output
    output Cout    // Carry output
);
    wire [3:0] P; // Propagate
    wire [3:0] G; // Generate
    wire [3:0] C; // Carry bits

    // Generate and propagate signals
    assign P = A ^ B; // Propagate
    assign G = A & B; // Generate

    // Carry generation
    assign C[0] = ~(~G[0] & ~(P[0] & Cin)); // Carry out from bit 0
    assign C[1] = G[1] | (P[1] & C[0]); // Carry out from bit 1
    assign C[2] = G[2] | (P[2] & C[1]); // Carry out from bit 2
    assign C[3] = G[3] | (P[3] & C[2]); // Carry out from bit 3

    // Sum generation
    assign S = P ^ {C[2:0], Cin}; // Sum output
    assign Cout = C[3]; // Final carry out

endmodule

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    output Y,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
);wire w1, w2;

    // Removed the instantiation of the unknown module
    // instead, let’s directly create the logic from the inputs

    assign w1 = A1 & A2;  // Logical AND between A1 and A2
    assign w2 = B1 & !A2; // Logical AND between B1 and NOT A2
    assign Y = w1~(~| & ~;)  // Final output Y is the logical OR of w1 and w2

endmodule

module top_module(input [7:0] a, b,
            output [7:0] c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k);assign c = a & b;               
    assign d = ~(~a & ~b);               
    assign e = a ^ b;               
    assign f = ~a;                  
    assign g = {a[3:0], b[3:0]};    
    assign h = a >> 3;              
    assign i = &b;                  
    assign j = (a > b) ? a : b;     
    assign k = a - b;               
endmodule

module top_module(
    output reg X,
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire D,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB
);wire or_output;
    
    // Simple four-input OR gate implementation
    assign or_output = ~(~A | B | C & ~D);

    always @ (or_output) begin
        X = or_output;
    end

endmodule

    output sum,
    output cout
);

    assign sum = a ^ b ^ cin; // Calculate the sum
    assign cout = ~(~(a & b) | (b & cin) & ~(a & cin)); // Calculate the carry-out

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input cin,
    output [3:0] sum,
    output cout
);wire [4:0] c; // Carry wires
    wire [3:0] g; // Generate signals
    wire [3:0] p; // Propagate signals

    assign g = a ^ b; // Generate signal (XOR)
    assign p = a & b; // Propagate signal (AND)

    assign c[0] = cin; // Initial carry-in
    assign c[1] = ~(~p[0] & ~(g[0] & c[0])); // Carry out for bit 1
    assign c[2] = p[1] | (g[1] & c[1]); // Carry out for bit 2
    assign c[3] = p[2] | (g[2] & c[2]); // Carry out for bit 3
    assign c[4] = p[3] | (g[3] & c[3]); // Final carry out

    assign sum = g ^ {c[3:1], c[0]}; // Sum calculation using XOR with carry
    assign cout = c[4]; // Final carry out

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b,
  input cin,
  output [3:0] sum,
  output cout
);wire c1, c2, c3; // intermediate carry signals

  // Full adder for bit 0
  assign sum[0] = a[0] ^ b[0] ^ cin; // Sum of the first bit
  assign c1 = ~(~(a[0] & b[0]) & ~((a[0] ^ b[0]) & cin)); // Carry out of the first bit

  // Full adder for bit 1
  assign sum[1] = a[1] ^ b[1] ^ c1; // Sum of the second bit
  assign c2 = (a[1] & b[1]) | ((a[1] ^ b[1]) & c1); // Carry out of the second bit

  // Full adder for bit 2
  assign sum[2] = a[2] ^ b[2] ^ c2; // Sum of the third bit
  assign c3 = (a[2] & b[2]) | ((a[2] ^ b[2]) & c2); // Carry out of the third bit

  // Full adder for bit 3
  assign sum[3] = a[3] ^ b[3] ^ c3; // Sum of the fourth bit
  assign cout = (a[3] & b[3]) | ((a[3] ^ b[3]) & c3); // Final carry out

endmodule

module full_adder_1bit(
    input a,            // 1-bit binary input.
    input b,            // 1-bit binary input.
    input cin,          // 1-bit carry input.

    output sum,         // 1-bit sum output.
    output cout         // 1-bit carry output.
);

assign sum = a ^ b ^ cin; // Sum is XOR of a, b, and cin.
assign cout = ~(~(a & b) | (b & cin) & ~(a & cin)); // Carry-out is the majority function.

endmodule

module mux_4to1 (
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input S0,
    input S1,
    output Y
);

    assign Y = ~(~(~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) & ~(S1 & S0 & D));

endmodule

module ten_to_one(
  input A1,
  input A2,
  input A3,
  input B1,
  input B2,
  input C1,
  input C2,
  input D1,
  input D2,
  input D3,
  output X
);

  assign X = ~(~(A1 & A2 & A3) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) & ~(~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3));

endmodule

module six_input_one_output (
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  B1,
    input  B2,
    input  C1,
    input  C2,
    output Y
);

    assign Y = ~(~(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) & ~(C1 & C2));

endmodule

module multi_input_output (
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output Y
);

    assign Y = ~(~(A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G) & ~H);

endmodule

module or3 (
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  C   ,
    output X   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);
    assign X = ~(~A | B & ~C);
endmodule

module mux_2to1 (
    input A,
    input B,
    input Sel,
    output Out,
    input VPB,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VNB
);

assign Out = ~(~(!Sel & A) & ~(Sel & B));

endmodule
